title: Question: No rule to make target `verilated.o', needed by `Vour'.  Stop.
body:
---


Author Name: **Angelos Spanos**
Original Redmine Message: 414 from https://www.veripool.org



---

Hi all,

I am trying to make the "EXAMPLE C++ EXECUTION" project mentioned in the Verilator-3.805 by Wilson Snyder textbook and I am getting this error. I googled it but i couldn't find an answer.

 /================================================================================
 make: *** No rule to make target `verilated.o', needed by `Vour'.  Stop.
 /================================================================================


I am using the Fedora 14 FEL. 

I am sending you the output of the terminal as I build the project

```
/================================================================================
[ICDesigner@localhost Verilator]$ mkdir test_our
[ICDesigner@localhost Verilator]$ cd test_our
[ICDesigner@localhost test_our]$ cat <<EOF >our.v
> module our;
> initial begin \$display("Hello World"); \$finish; end
> endmodule
> EOF
[ICDesigner@localhost test_our]$ cat <<EOF >sim_main.cpp
> #include "Vour.h"
> #include "verilated.h"
> int main(int argc, char **argv, char **env) {
> Verilated::commandArgs(argc, argv);
> Vour* top = new Vour;
> while (!Verilated::gotFinish()) { top->eval(); }
> exit(0);
> }
> EOF
[ICDesigner@localhost test_our]$ export VERILATOR_ROOT=/usr/bin
[ICDesigner@localhost test_our]$ /usr/bin/verilator -cc our.v --exe sim_main.cpp
[ICDesigner@localhost test_our]$ ls -l obj_dir
total 23
-rwxrwxrwx. 1 ICDesigner ICDesigner 1079 Dec 27 17:12 Vour_classes.mk
-rwxrwxrwx. 1 ICDesigner ICDesigner 3212 Dec 27 17:12 Vour.cpp
-rwxrwxrwx. 1 ICDesigner ICDesigner 2342 Dec 27 17:12 Vour.h
-rwxrwxrwx. 1 ICDesigner ICDesigner 1779 Dec 27 17:12 Vour.mk
-rwxrwxrwx. 1 ICDesigner ICDesigner  565 Dec 27 17:12 Vour__Syms.cpp
-rwxrwxrwx. 1 ICDesigner ICDesigner  941 Dec 27 17:12 Vour__Syms.h
-rwxrwxrwx. 1 ICDesigner ICDesigner  194 Dec 27 17:12 Vour__ver.d
-rwxrwxrwx. 1 ICDesigner ICDesigner  572 Dec 27 17:12 Vour__verFiles.dat
[ICDesigner@localhost test_our]$ cd obj_dir
[ICDesigner@localhost obj_dir]$ make -j -f Vour.mk Vour
Vour.mk:55: /usr/bin/include/verilated.mk: No such file or directory
make: *** No rule to make target `/usr/bin/include/verilated.mk'.  Stop.
[ICDesigner@localhost obj_dir]$ locate verilated.mk
/usr/share/verilator/include/verilated.mk
[ICDesigner@localhost obj_dir]$ make -j -f Vour.mk Vour
g++  -I. -MMD -I/usr/bin/include -I/usr/bin/include/vltstd -DVL_PRINTF=printf -DVM_TRACE=0 -DVM_COVERAGE=0        -c -o sim_main.o ../sim_main.cpp
make: *** No rule to make target `verilated.o', needed by `Vour'.  Stop.
make: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
In file included from ../sim_main.cpp:1:0:
./Vour.h:11:23: fatal error: verilated.h: No such file or directory
compilation terminated.
make: *** [sim_main.o] Error 1
[ICDesigner@localhost obj_dir]$ locate verilated.h
/usr/share/verilator/include/verilated.h
[ICDesigner@localhost obj_dir]$ pwd
/media/NTFS/Source/Verilator/test_our/obj_dir
[ICDesigner@localhost obj_dir]$ cp /usr/share/verilator/include/verilated.h /media/NTFS/Source/Verilator/test_our/obj_dir
[ICDesigner@localhost obj_dir]$ make -j -f Vour.mk Vour
g++  -I. -MMD -I/usr/bin/include -I/usr/bin/include/vltstd -DVL_PRINTF=printf -DVM_TRACE=0 -DVM_COVERAGE=0        -c -o sim_main.o ../sim_main.cpp
make: *** No rule to make target `verilated.o', needed by `Vour'.  Stop.
make: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
In file included from ./Vour.h:11:0,
                  from ../sim_main.cpp:1:
./verilated.h:31:25: fatal error: verilatedos.h: No such file or directory
compilation terminated.
make: *** [sim_main.o] Error 1
[ICDesigner@localhost obj_dir]$ locate verilatedos.h 
/usr/share/verilator/include/verilatedos.h
[ICDesigner@localhost obj_dir]$ pwd
/media/NTFS/Source/Verilator/test_our/obj_dir
[ICDesigner@localhost obj_dir]$ cp /usr/share/verilator/include/verilatedos.h /media/NTFS/Source/Verilator/test_our/obj_dir
[ICDesigner@localhost obj_dir]$ make -j -f Vour.mk Vour
g++  -I. -MMD -I/usr/bin/include -I/usr/bin/include/vltstd -DVL_PRINTF=printf -DVM_TRACE=0 -DVM_COVERAGE=0        -c -o sim_main.o ../sim_main.cpp
make: *** No rule to make target `verilated.o', needed by `Vour'.  Stop.
make: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
/================================================================================

```

Because the make couldn't file some files I copied them into the project folder. I also made the following change in the Vour.mk file

 ## include $(VERILATOR_ROOT)/include/verilated.mk
 include /usr/share/verilator/include/verilated.mk

Thank you in advance for your answer and congradulations for your program.

Sincerely,
Spanos Angelos
